quotes: Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (split (≈40/60).

rules.intent: Ensure consistent email width and reliable responsive collapsing behavior across all clients.
rules.rule_text: Email body width must be fixed at 600px (dimension.canvas.width = 600px), centered, with sections rendering edge-to-edge. Multi-column layouts must collapse to a single column at the mobile breakpoint of 480px (breakpoint.grid.mobile = 480px).

quotes: Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
- Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
- Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Establish consistent visual rhythm and block alignment to allow programmatic zero-gap block assembly.
rules.rule_text: All internal vertical margins and padding must use multiples of the 8px base unit (spacing.grid.base_unit = 8px). Section side padding must be 24px (padding.section.side = 24px) to ensure seamless stack alignment, and top/bottom internal padding per section must be 32px (padding.section.vertical = 32px). Vertical flows must enforce 16px from heading to body (margin.flow.heading_to_body = 16px), 24px from body to CTA (margin.flow.body_to_cta = 24px), and 8px from image to caption (margin.flow.image_to_caption = 8px).

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Maintain brand CTA design signature while enforcing rigorous mobile accessibility target sizes.
rules.rule_text: CTA buttons must enforce a minimum clickable height of 48px (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = 48px) and a corner pill radius of 24px (radius.cta.standard_button = 24px). Primary CTAs feature a Brand Blue (#00529b) background with White text, and secondary CTAs feature a White background with a 2px Brand Blue border. A maximum of one primary CTA is allowed per section.
